---
name: Good First Issue
about: A beginner-friendly task for new contributors
title: "[Good First]: "
labels: ["good first issue", "help wanted"]
---

## Task Description

What needs to be done? Keep this concrete and narrow — this should be a
single, focused task that a new contributor can complete in 1–2 hours.

## Expected Outcome

What should the completed work do?

## Where to Start

- Relevant module: `feature-*` / `core-*` / `shared-kmp`
- Relevant ADR: [ADR-XXX](docs/adr/ADR-XXX.md)
- Relevant file: `path/to/file.kt`

## Requirements

- [ ] Follows module boundary rules (no `feature-*` → `feature-*` imports)
- [ ] No proprietary dependencies in `fdroid` / `github` flavors
- [ ] All user-facing strings use `strings.xml`
- [ ] Unit tests added for new behavior
- [ ] Conventional commit message

## Getting Help

If you're stuck, comment on the issue. We'll point you in the right direction.
You don't need to be an expert to contribute.
